description:
warecache Smart Inventory Management companion app
warecache is a Smart Inventory Management tool to make inventory easy. Specialized storage bins are utilized to automatically measure
what you have so you always know the current state of your stock.

This application is a companion app to allow for easy handling of incoming parts and searching for items you have. It does not have the full
feature-set as the desktop application, but still delivers on day to day use.

Features:
- Scan barcodes and QR codes to quickly look up parts
- Search parts by MPN across all part types or within a specific type
- View part details including distributors, pricing, and sensor locations
- Register and unregister parts to sensors
- Browse inventory by containers and sensors
- Automatic background sync keeps data up to date
- Offline cache for use without network connectivity
